title: sambucus pubens var. xanthocarpa
intro: Sambucus pubens var. xanthocarpa, also known as the yellow elder or American yellow elder, is a plant that belongs to the family Adoxaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant's berries, flowers, and leaves are used in herbal preparations to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and sore throats, as well as to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Sambucus pubens var. xanthocarpa include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its health benefits and promote overall well-being.
